title: Mutant Iceologer Mod
description: Woah this is one Buff Illager, Meet the Mutant Iceologer. This guy is a BEAST when it comes to fighting so be careful or you might be in for not a N-Ice time!
body:
Woah this is one Buff Illager, Meet the Mutant Iceologer. This guy is a BEAST when it comes to fighting so be careful or you might be in for not a N-Ice time!

In the Mutant Iceologer Mod, it adds a new mob that is a recreation of a popular Bedrock Add-on of mine based on the Iceologer from Minecraft Dungeons It is part of the illager team that spawns in the snowy biomes at night time and will throw Ice Chunks at its targets such as villagers, iron golems, players, and snow golems! This is a BEAST of a mob so be prepared for a battle!


**Mutant Iceologer:**

An ice-summoning Illager who is the real deal when it comes to fighting, you do NOT want to mess with this guy, He uses his magic to summon huge ice chunks and throws them at you, and even ground pounds! It spawns in snow biomes at night time, killing it will drop some emeralds along with blue ice, snow blocks, and a new type of Ice block called The Chilled Spike Block.


![Showcase art for the Mutant Iceologer Mob](https://api.mcpedl.com/storage/submissions/168748/images/mutant-iceologer_2.png)

Health 150 (75 hearts)

If you manage to kill this fierce foe, it has a chance to drop a new block called The Chilled Spike Block

![Showcase art for The Chilled Spike Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9lbfIPsl/images/2c42669decceb64c16b8bd8876b2c7a722980261.png)

This block is used as ammo for the Iceologer Staff and can also be found in the creative menu along with the Mutant Iceologer and the Iceologer Staff.

Want to harness the power of the Mutant Iceologer? Well now you can with the Iceologer Staff!

![Showcase art for the Iceologer Staff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5735dd46ea4b08cccf651c04ce00601e62f5deda.png)

To craft the Iceologer Staff you will need 2 Iron Rod's, Iron Rod's can be crafted as shown below.

![Iron Rod Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ea344e411aa66b0e736229f4d7d989ee1cbea88.png)

Once crafted you will need to Chill them, to Chill them you can right click a Cauldron full of Powdered Snow.

![Cauldron of Powdered Snow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01e3452eab5e3ed278a32ab6385f088858a59bdc.png)

And finally to craft the Iceologer Staff you will need 2 Chilled Iron Rod's, and 1 Chilled Spike block.

![Iceologer Staff Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/702face8287d1ed461e835cd9fc1f186311a6dc0.png)

If you would like to report any bugs or suggestions you can by joining my official discord server below

Discord Server: https://discord.gg/cDbJwQB
